name: Google Workspace
description: Access Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, and all Google Workspace APIs through AI chat. Powered by the official Google Workspace CLI.
user_auth_instructions:
1. Click 'Connect' to link your Google account.
2. Sign in with your Google Workspace account.
3. Review and approve the requested permissions.
4. You'll be redirected back automatically.

Note: Your organization admin must first set up a Google Cloud OAuth Client ID.
setup_notes:
Requires a Google Cloud project with OAuth 2.0 Client ID (Web application type) configured.

Admin setup:
1. Go to https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials
2. Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID (type: Web application)
3. Add authorized redirect URI: {your_app_url}/api/v1/mcp-servers/{server_id}/oauth/callback
4. Enable the Google Workspace APIs you need (Drive, Gmail, Calendar, etc.)
5. Enter the Client ID and Client Secret in the server configuration

Also requires the Google Workspace CLI to be installed:
  npm install -g @googleworkspace/cli
